utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 items appear in the final package. Check if fully specified: 1) destination: specified (Prague, Czech Republic). 2) travel_dates: specified with dates and duration. 3) transportation: includes origin/destination, passengers (4 people), total cost (€400), departure and return times/dates, and a reference—sufficient flight details with costs. 4) accommodation: hotel name/description, location, room type, nights, total cost, and reference—meets requirements. 5) activities: listed with dates (some have dates/range), individual costs and total—meets requirement for selected activities with costs. 6) additional_services: provides restaurant recommendations with phone numbers—these count as extra services; costs are not provided, but the format says 'any extra services with costs'—however, extra services can be recommendations; since costs are not mandatory unless applicable, this is acceptable. 7) total_budget: provides total and breakdown by category and notes under budget—meets requirement. Therefore, all 7 are included and sufficiently specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item from the final package to the closest corresponding entry in the ground-truth ratings. Destination 'Prague, Czech Republic' matches the destinations list. Transportation specifies flights but not class; we map to the most specific applicable category, which is 'standard_airlines -> Economy Class' given the low total (€400 for 4) suggesting economy; however, since class isn't explicit, we only map if an exact item exists. Accommodation 'Historic Lodge' is an exact match in accommodation. Activities include 'City Walking Tour', 'Museum Day Passes' (maps to 'Museum Day Pass'), 'Science Museum Kids' (maps to 'Science Museum for kids'), and 'Family Cycling Adventure'—there is no cycling activity in the ground truth, so we omit it. Restaurants include 'Middle Eastern Grill' and 'Italian Trattoria Da Mario'; we map to categories 'Middle Eastern Grill' and 'Italian Trattoria'.
